data.name: m_tlpSketchPad.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="m_sketchPadToolbar" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="m_sketchPad" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="AutoSize,0,Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: m_tlpAssingments.LayoutSettings
